sourcesContent:
export const COLORS = {
  primary: '#FFB6C1',
  primaryDark: '#FF91A4',
  primaryLight: '#FFD1D9',
  background: '#FFF8F0',
  backgroundDark: '#2D2D2D',
  hunger: '#FF6B6B',
  thirst: '#4ECDC4',
  hygiene: '#95E1D3',
  mood: '#FFE66D',
  intimacy: '#DDA0DD',
  text: '#4A4A4A',
  textLight: '#8A8A8A',
  textWhite: '#FFFFFF',
  button: '#FFB6C1',
  card: '#FFFFFF',
  statusHappy: '#4CAF50',
  statusNormal: '#FFC107',
  statusWorried: '#FF9800',
  statusCritical: '#F44336',
};

export const SPACING = { xs: 4, sm: 8, md: 16, lg: 24, xl: 32 };
export const FONT_SIZES = { xs: 12, sm: 14, md: 16, lg: 20, xl: 24, xxl: 32 };
export const BORDER_RADIUS = { sm: 8, md: 12, lg: 16, xl: 24, full: 9999 };
